commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared user-turn transcript recorder and routes Gateway chat, reply dispatch, CLI/Pi runtimes, Codex app-server mirroring, idempotency, hooks, and fallback persistence through it.

PR surface: Source +910, Tests +1880. Total +2790 across 30 files.

Reproducibility: yes. the PR body gives a concrete media-user-turn scenario and screenshot proof, and the current source has separate live projection/rewrite paths that the PR replaces. I did not rerun the scenario in this read-only pass.
